title: Product Marketing Specialist
required_skills: 5+ years of experience in Product Marketing or related role
bonus_skills: Experience working across multiple roles or disciplines
Background in Customer Experience, Marketing, or Sales
matched_skills: Background in Marketing and Customer Experience
missing_skills: 5+ years (CV states 4+ years; falls slightly short of stated requirement)
core_responsibilities: Lead product communication and go-to-market execution across channels
Own and continuously evolve product messaging and positioning
Drive campaigns, content, and announcements for product launches
Align closely with Product, Sales, and Customer Success for consistent messaging
Monitor competitors and industry trends to inform strategy
recommended_emphasis: Quantify GTM impact — highlight the 4.6M CNY in contracts from IoT product launches as direct evidence of go-to-market execution capability
Strengthen SaaS adjacency — frame Hapag-Lloyd and HSBC digital transformation work to demonstrate familiarity with software/platform contexts
Emphasise cross-functional coordination — HSBC PMO role acting as central interface between Product, Engineering, Marketing, and C-suite maps directly to Datasite's coordination mandate
Address the years-of-experience gap — consolidate all relevant roles (2019–present) to present a clear 5+ year narrative rather than stopping at 4+
Highlight automation and process improvement — mention any marketing process optimisation or tooling work
